The following tests cover the requirement "PQ values to HES within 4 hours":
- T-0 (Database hosting)
- T-1 (Encryption keys)
- T-2 (Security log)
- T-3 (Synchronization with GE controlled NTP)
- T-4 (Function of the metering unit after loss of phases on Cat1)
- T-5 (Function of the metering unit after phase loss on Cat2)
- T-14 (Energy values to other system within 10 sec)
- T-15 (Help function)
- T-16 (Setting the number of decimal places)
- T-17 (View last measurement value and time)
- T-18 (Calendar in Swedish format)
- T-23 (Record when power output exceeds limit value)
- T-24 (Register when power output exceeds limit value)
- T-25 (View last measurement value and time)
- T-26 (Communication status - Cat1 1 phase)
- T-27 (Communication status - Cat1 3 phase)
- T-28 (Communication status - Cat2)
- T-30 (Interpolation in HES)

These tests cover the requirement "PQ values to HES within 4 hours" by verifying that the system documentation describes the databases and database versions used, verifying that encryption keys are managed, verifying that the solution description details how encryption keys are managed, verifying that switching on and off and status of breakers from other GE system is possible, verifying that the metering unit is able to record and store information when the following events occur: total power consumption exceeds set limit value, connection overheating, and in case of connection loss, and verifying that the metering unit is able to interpolate in HES when the collected value is missing. Additionally, the tests verify that the Metering System is able to record and store information when the following events occur: power output exceeds limit value and register when power output exceeds limit value. The tests also verify that the HES calendar is displayed in Swedish format and that the last Measured Value and the time of communication with the Metering Unit are displayed in HES.

The following tests cover the requirement "Energy values to other system within 10 sec":

- Test T-13: Verify that the Metering System is able to record and store information when the following Events occur: "15. Total power consumption exceeds set limit value"
- Test T-14: Verify that the goods are delivered from HES according to the agreed export interval
- Test T-15: For example, turn off the connection between Collection Manager and OMNIA Flex.
- Test T-16: Verify that the last Measured Value and the time of communication with the Metering Unit are displayed in HES.
- Test T-17: Verify that the HES calendar is displayed in Swedish format (YYYY-MM-DD, Y=year, M=month, D=day)
- Test T-18: Verify that the Metering System is able to record and store information when the following Events occur: "17. In case of connection overheating"
- Test T-20: Verify that it is possible to view the communication status of the Metering Unit directly, without manual intervention and without opening the meter.
- Test T-21: Verify that it is possible to view the communication status of the Metering Unit directly, without manual intervention and without opening the meter.
- Test T-22: Verify that it is possible to view the communication status of the Metering Unit directly, without manual intervention and without opening the meter.
- Test T-23: Verify that the Metering System is able to record and store information when the following Events occur: "15. Total power consumption exceeds set limit value"
- Test T-24: Verify that the PQ values (15-minute values) can be delivered at the latest within 4 hours from the registration in the Metering Units to HES.
- Test T-25: Verify that a serial number on a Communication Module is positioned so that it is not visible on the front of the Metering Unit.
- Test T-26: Verify that a serial number on a Communication Module is positioned so that it is not visible on the front of the Metering Unit.
- Test T-27: Verify that the marking of the meter's manufacturing number is clearly legible.
- Test T-28: Verify that the marking of the meter's manufacturing number is clearly legible.
- Test T-29: Verify that the manufacturing number on the meter is not visible on the front of the Metering Unit.
- Test T-30: Verify that the number of decimal places displayed corresponds to the number of decimal places configured to be displayed for a measurement value.
- Test T-31: Verify that the number of decimal places displayed corresponds to the number of decimal places configured to be displayed for a measurement value.

These tests cover the requirement "Energy values to other system within 10 sec" by verifying that the Metering System is able to record and store information when the energy values are transmitted to the HES within the required time frame. Additionally, the tests ensure that the manufacturing numbers on the communication modules are legible and not visible on the front of the Metering Unit.
